sentences.arabic: تَنَاوُلُ الْفَوَاكِهِ وَالْخَضْرَاوَاتِ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا لِصِحَّةِ الْجِسْمِ.
sentences.translation: Konzumiranje voća i povrća je veoma važno za zdravlje tijela.
sentences.translationEn: Eating fruits and vegetables is very important for body health.

sentences.arabic: تَحْتَوِي هَذِهِ الْأَطْعِمَةُ عَلَى فِيتَامِينَاتٍ وَمَعَادِنَ كَثِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ove namirnice sadrže mnogo vitamina i minerala.
sentences.translationEn: These foods contain many vitamins and minerals.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَأْكُلَ أَلْوَانًا مُخْتَلِفَةً لِلْحُصُولِ عَلَى أَفْضَلِ الْفَوَائِدِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo jesti različite boje kako bismo dobili najbolje prednosti.
sentences.translationEn: We must eat different colors to get the best benefits.
